mapper.select:
select count(case when p.remain_amount > 0 then 1 end) openCount, coalesce(sum(case when p.remain_amount > 0 then p.remain_amount else 0 end), 0.00) outstandingAmount, count(case when p.remain_amount > 0 and p.due_date < curdate() then 1 end) overdueCount, coalesce(sum(case when p.remain_amount > 0 and p.due_date < curdate() then p.remain_amount else 0 end), 0.00) overdueAmount, count(case when p.remain_amount > 0 and p.due_date between curdate() and date_add(curdate(), interval 7 day) then 1 end) due7Count, coalesce(sum(case when p.remain_amount > 0 and p.due_date between curdate() and date_add(curdate(), interval 7 day) then p.remain_amount else 0 end), 0.00) due7Amount, (select count(1) from fin_supplier_invoice si where si.invoice_status = 'pending') pendingInvoiceCount, (select count(1) from fin_supplier_invoice si where si.invoice_status = 'pending' and si.match_status = 'exception') exceptionInvoiceCount, (select coalesce(sum(greatest(pr.payment_amount - coalesce(pr.paid_amount, 0.00), 0.00)), 0.00) from fin_payment_request pr where pr.payment_status in ('submitted', 'approved', 'partially_paid')) pendingPaymentAmount from fin_payable_bill p
and p.period_code = #{periodCode} and p.counterparty_name like concat('%', #{counterpartyName}, '%')

select bucket agingBucket, count(*) billCount, coalesce(sum(remain_amount), 0.00) remainAmount from ( select p.remain_amount, case when p.due_date is null or p.due_date >= curdate() then 'not_due' when datediff(curdate(), p.due_date) <= 30 then '1_30' when datediff(curdate(), p.due_date) <= 60 then '31_60' when datediff(curdate(), p.due_date) <= 90 then '61_90' else 'over_90' end bucket from fin_payable_bill p where p.remain_amount > 0 and p.period_code = #{periodCode} and p.counterparty_name like concat('%', #{counterpartyName}, '%') ) a group by bucket order by field(bucket, 'not_due', '1_30', '31_60', '61_90', 'over_90')

select si.invoice_id invoiceId, si.invoice_no invoiceNo, si.supplier_invoice_no supplierInvoiceNo, si.purchase_no purchaseNo, si.receipt_refs receiptRefs, si.supplier_id supplierId, si.supplier_name supplierName, si.invoice_date invoiceDate, si.due_date dueDate, si.period_code periodCode, si.amount_ex_tax amountExTax, si.tax_amount taxAmount, si.line_total_amount lineTotalAmount, si.total_amount totalAmount, si.header_variance headerVariance, si.match_policy matchPolicy, si.price_tolerance_percent priceTolerancePercent, si.quantity_tolerance quantityTolerance, si.amount_tolerance amountTolerance, si.match_status matchStatus, si.invoice_status invoiceStatus, si.exception_reason exceptionReason, si.payable_no payableNo, si.approve_by approveBy, si.approve_time approveTime, si.create_by createBy, si.create_time createTime, si.remark, coalesce(x.exception_count, 0) exceptionLineCount, coalesce(x.line_count, 0) lineCount from fin_supplier_invoice si left join ( select invoice_id, count(*) line_count, sum(case when line_match_status = 'exception' then 1 else 0 end) exception_count from fin_supplier_invoice_item group by invoice_id ) x on x.invoice_id = si.invoice_id
and (si.invoice_no like concat('%', #{invoiceNo}, '%') or si.supplier_invoice_no like concat('%', #{invoiceNo}, '%'))
and si.purchase_no like concat('%', #{purchaseNo}, '%') and si.supplier_name like concat('%', #{supplierName}, '%') and si.match_status = #{matchStatus} and si.invoice_status = #{invoiceStatus} and si.period_code = #{periodCode}
order by si.invoice_id desc

select item_id itemId, invoice_id invoiceId, invoice_no invoiceNo, purchase_item_id purchaseItemId, sku_id skuId, sku_code skuCode, sku_name skuName, invoice_quantity invoiceQuantity, invoice_unit_price invoiceUnitPrice, invoice_tax_rate invoiceTaxRate, invoice_amount invoiceAmount, tax_amount taxAmount, total_amount totalAmount, order_quantity orderQuantity, order_unit_price orderUnitPrice, received_quantity receivedQuantity, previous_invoiced_quantity previousInvoicedQuantity, available_received_quantity availableReceivedQuantity, quantity_variance quantityVariance, price_variance priceVariance, price_variance_percent priceVariancePercent, amount_variance amountVariance, line_match_status lineMatchStatus, match_message matchMessage from fin_supplier_invoice_item where invoice_no = #{invoiceNo} order by item_id

select p.purchase_no purchaseNo, p.purchase_date purchaseDate, p.supplier_id supplierId, p.supplier_name supplierName, p.purchase_status purchaseStatus, p.total_amount totalAmount, p.tax_amount taxAmount, p.total_with_tax totalWithTax, coalesce(sum(i.received_qty), 0) receivedQuantity, coalesce(sum(i.quantity), 0) orderQuantity, r.receipt_refs receiptRefs from erp_purchase_order p inner join erp_purchase_order_item i on i.purchase_id = p.purchase_id left join ( select purchase_no, group_concat(receipt_no order by receipt_date separator ',') receipt_refs from erp_purchase_receipt where receipt_status not in ('draft', 'cancelled', 'rejected') group by purchase_no ) r on r.purchase_no = p.purchase_no where p.purchase_status in ('approved', 'processing', 'receiving', 'completed', 'done', 'closed')
and (p.purchase_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.supplier_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
group by p.purchase_id, p.purchase_no, p.purchase_date, p.supplier_id, p.supplier_name, p.purchase_status, p.total_amount, p.tax_amount, p.total_with_tax, r.receipt_refs having coalesce(sum(i.received_qty), 0) > 0 order by p.purchase_date desc, p.purchase_id desc limit 100

select p.purchase_id purchaseId, p.purchase_no purchaseNo, p.purchase_date purchaseDate, p.supplier_id supplierId, p.supplier_name supplierName, p.purchase_status purchaseStatus, p.warehouse_id warehouseId, w.warehouse_name warehouseName, p.total_amount totalAmount, p.tax_amount taxAmount, p.total_with_tax totalWithTax, coalesce(s.payment_days, 30) paymentDays, r.receipt_refs receiptRefs from erp_purchase_order p left join erp_supplier s on s.supplier_id = p.supplier_id left join erp_warehouse w on w.warehouse_id = p.warehouse_id left join ( select purchase_no, group_concat(receipt_no order by receipt_date separator ',') receipt_refs from erp_purchase_receipt where receipt_status not in ('draft', 'cancelled', 'rejected') group by purchase_no ) r on r.purchase_no = p.purchase_no where p.purchase_no = #{purchaseNo}

select i.item_id purchaseItemId, i.sku_id skuId, i.sku_code skuCode, i.sku_name skuName, i.quantity orderQuantity, i.received_qty receivedQuantity, i.purchase_price orderUnitPrice, i.tax_rate taxRate, i.amount orderAmount, i.tax_inclusive_amount orderTotalAmount, coalesce(inv.invoiced_quantity, 0) invoicedQuantity, greatest(i.received_qty - coalesce(inv.invoiced_quantity, 0), 0) availableReceivedQuantity from erp_purchase_order_item i left join ( select sii.purchase_item_id, sum(sii.invoice_quantity) invoiced_quantity from fin_supplier_invoice_item sii inner join fin_supplier_invoice si on si.invoice_id = sii.invoice_id where si.invoice_status in ('pending', 'approved') group by sii.purchase_item_id ) inv on inv.purchase_item_id = i.item_id where i.purchase_no = #{purchaseNo} order by i.item_id
select bank_account_id bankAccountId, account_name accountName, bank_name bankName, bank_no bankNo, currency from fin_bank_account where status = '0' order by bank_account_id

select cf.cash_flow_id cashFlowId, cf.flow_no flowNo, cf.flow_type flowType, cf.flow_category flowCategory, cf.bank_account_id bankAccountId, cf.platform_account_id platformAccountId, cf.counterparty_type counterpartyType, cf.counterparty_name counterpartyName, cf.source_type sourceType, cf.source_no sourceNo, cf.currency, cf.external_reference externalReference, cf.amount, cf.fee_amount feeAmount, cf.net_amount netAmount, cf.settled_amount settledAmount, greatest(cf.amount - cf.settled_amount, 0.00) availableAmount, cf.flow_time flowTime, cf.business_date businessDate, cf.match_status matchStatus, cf.entry_status entryStatus, cf.voucher_no voucherNo, cf.reversal_flow_no reversalFlowNo, cf.posted_by postedBy, cf.posted_time postedTime, cf.reversed_by reversedBy, cf.reversed_time reversedTime, cf.create_time createTime, cf.remark, coalesce(ba.account_name, pa.account_no) accountName, coalesce(ba.bank_name, pa.platform_name) accountInstitution from fin_cash_flow cf left join fin_bank_account ba on ba.bank_account_id = cf.bank_account_id left join fin_platform_account pa on pa.platform_account_id = cf.platform_account_id
and (cf.flow_no like concat('%', #{flowNo}, '%') or cf.external_reference like concat('%', #{flowNo}, '%'))
and cf.flow_type = #{flowType} and cf.flow_category = #{flowCategory} and cf.counterparty_name like concat('%', #{counterpartyName}, '%') and cf.source_no like concat('%', #{sourceNo}, '%') and cf.match_status = #{matchStatus} and cf.entry_status = #{entryStatus} and cf.business_date >= #{beginBusinessDate} and cf.business_date <= #{endBusinessDate}
order by cf.cash_flow_id desc

select coalesce(sum(case when flow_type = 'in' and entry_status in ('posted', 'reversed') then net_amount else 0 end), 0.00) inflowAmount, coalesce(sum(case when flow_type = 'out' and entry_status in ('posted', 'reversed') then net_amount else 0 end), 0.00) outflowAmount, coalesce(sum(case when entry_status in ('posted', 'reversed') then case when flow_type = 'in' then net_amount else -net_amount end else 0 end), 0.00) netCashAmount, coalesce(sum(case when entry_status = 'posted' then greatest(amount - settled_amount, 0.00) else 0 end), 0.00) unallocatedAmount, sum(case when entry_status = 'draft' then 1 else 0 end) draftCount, sum(case when entry_status = 'posted' and match_status != 'matched' then 1 else 0 end) unmatchedCount from fin_cash_flow
and business_date >= #{beginBusinessDate} and business_date <= #{endBusinessDate}

select 'bank' accountType, bank_account_id accountId, account_name accountName, bank_name institutionName, bank_no accountNo, currency from fin_bank_account where status = '0' union all select 'platform' accountType, platform_account_id accountId, concat(platform_name, ' / ', coalesce(shop_name, '')) accountName, platform_name institutionName, account_no accountNo, currency from fin_platform_account where status = '0' order by accountType, accountId

select diff_id diffId, task_id taskId, diff_no diffNo, diff_type diffType, source_type sourceType, source_no sourceNo, expected_amount expectedAmount, actual_amount actualAmount, diff_amount diffAmount, diff_status diffStatus, handle_result handleResult, create_time createTime, remark from fin_reconciliation_diff where diff_no = #{diffNo}

select settlement_id settlementId, settlement_no settlementNo, platform_code platformCode, platform_name platformName, shop_id shopId, shop_name shopName, period_code periodCode, bill_start_date billStartDate, bill_end_date billEndDate, income_amount incomeAmount, refund_amount refundAmount, commission_fee commissionFee, payment_fee paymentFee, ad_fee adFee, service_fee serviceFee, freight_fee freightFee, other_fee otherFee, receivable_amount receivableAmount, received_amount receivedAmount, diff_amount diffAmount, settlement_status settlementStatus, reconcile_status reconcileStatus from fin_platform_settlement where settlement_no = #{settlementNo}

select receivable_id receivableId, receivable_no receivableNo, source_type sourceType, source_no sourceNo, counterparty_name counterpartyName, shop_id shopId, shop_name shopName, period_code periodCode, bill_amount billAmount, writeoff_amount writeoffAmount, remain_amount remainAmount, due_date dueDate, bill_status billStatus from fin_receivable_bill where receivable_no = #{receivableNo}

select payable_id payableId, payable_no payableNo, source_type sourceType, source_no sourceNo, counterparty_type counterpartyType, counterparty_id counterpartyId, counterparty_name counterpartyName, period_code periodCode, bill_amount billAmount, writeoff_amount writeoffAmount, remain_amount remainAmount, due_date dueDate, bill_status billStatus from fin_payable_bill where payable_no = #{payableNo}

select date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m') currentPeriod, coalesce((select sum(remain_amount) from fin_receivable_bill where bill_status in ('open', 'partial')), 0.00) openReceivableAmount, coalesce((select sum(remain_amount) from fin_receivable_bill where bill_status in ('open', 'partial') and due_date < curdate()), 0.00) overdueReceivableAmount, (select count(*) from fin_receivable_bill where bill_status in ('open', 'partial') and due_date < curdate()) overdueReceivableCount, coalesce((select sum(remain_amount) from fin_payable_bill where bill_status in ('open', 'partial')), 0.00) openPayableAmount, coalesce((select sum(remain_amount) from fin_payable_bill where bill_status in ('open', 'partial') and due_date < curdate()), 0.00) overduePayableAmount, (select count(*) from fin_payable_bill where bill_status in ('open', 'partial') and due_date < curdate()) overduePayableCount, coalesce((select sum(net_amount) from fin_cash_flow where flow_type = 'in' and entry_status = 'posted' and business_date >= date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m-01')), 0.00) monthInflowAmount, coalesce((select sum(net_amount) from fin_cash_flow where flow_type = 'out' and entry_status = 'posted' and business_date >= date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m-01')), 0.00) monthOutflowAmount, (select count(*) from fin_cash_flow where entry_status = 'draft') draftCashCount, (select count(*) from fin_cash_flow where entry_status = 'posted' and match_status != 'matched') unmatchedCashCount, (select count(*) from fin_platform_settlement where settlement_status = 'draft') draftSettlementCount, (select count(*) from fin_platform_settlement where reconcile_status != 'matched') unmatchedSettlementCount, (select count(*) from fin_expense_bill where expense_status = 'draft') draftExpenseCount, (select count(*) from fin_voucher where voucher_status = 'draft') draftVoucherCount, (select count(*) from fin_payment_request where payment_status in ('submitted', 'approved', 'partially_paid')) pendingPaymentCount, coalesce((select sum(greatest(payment_amount - paid_amount, 0.00)) from fin_payment_request where payment_status in ('submitted', 'approved', 'partially_paid')), 0.00) pendingPaymentAmount, coalesce((select close_status from fin_period_close where period_code = date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m') and close_scope = 'company' limit 1), 'not_started') currentCloseStatus, coalesce((select check_status from fin_period_close where period_code = date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m') and close_scope = 'company' limit 1), 'unchecked') currentCheckStatus

select months.periodCode, coalesce(cash.inflowAmount, 0.00) inflowAmount, coalesce(cash.outflowAmount, 0.00) outflowAmount, coalesce(cash.inflowAmount, 0.00) - coalesce(cash.outflowAmount, 0.00) netAmount from ( select date_format(date_sub(curdate(), interval offsets.monthOffset month), '%Y-%m') periodCode from (select 0 monthOffset union all select 1 union all select 2 union all select 3 union all select 4 union all select 5) offsets ) months left join ( select date_format(business_date, '%Y-%m') periodCode, sum(case when flow_type = 'in' then net_amount else 0 end) inflowAmount, sum(case when flow_type = 'out' then net_amount else 0 end) outflowAmount from fin_cash_flow where entry_status = 'posted' and business_date >= date_format(date_sub(curdate(), interval 5 month), '%Y-%m-01') group by date_format(business_date, '%Y-%m') ) cash on cash.periodCode = months.periodCode order by months.periodCode

select activityType, bizNo, title, amount, status, businessTime from ( select 'cash_flow' activityType, flow_no bizNo, concat(case when flow_type = 'in' then '资金收款 · ' else '资金付款 · ' end, coalesce(counterparty_name, '未填写往来方')) title, net_amount amount, entry_status status, coalesce(update_time, create_time, flow_time) businessTime from fin_cash_flow union all select 'expense', expense_no, concat('费用单 · ', fee_type_name), total_amount, expense_status, coalesce(update_time, create_time) from fin_expense_bill union all select 'payment', payment_no, concat('付款申请 · ', coalesce(counterparty_name, '未填写供应商')), payment_amount, payment_status, coalesce(update_time, create_time) from fin_payment_request union all select 'voucher', voucher_no, concat('会计凭证 · ', coalesce(summary, source_no)), debit_amount, voucher_status, coalesce(update_time, create_time) from fin_voucher ) activities order by businessTime desc limit 12

select ledger_id ledgerId, voucher_no voucherNo, period_code periodCode, voucher_date voucherDate, subject_code subjectCode, subject_name subjectName, dc direction, amount, counterparty_name counterpartyName, source_type sourceType, source_no sourceNo, create_time createTime from fin_ledger_entry
and period_code = #{periodCode} and voucher_no like concat('%', #{voucherNo}, '%') and subject_code like concat(#{subjectCode}, '%') and subject_name like concat('%', #{subjectName}, '%') and source_no like concat('%', #{sourceNo}, '%')
order by voucher_date desc, voucher_no desc, ledger_id

select trial_id trialId, period_code periodCode, subject_code subjectCode, subject_name subjectName, begin_debit beginDebit, begin_credit beginCredit, current_debit currentDebit, current_credit currentCredit, end_debit endDebit, end_credit endCredit, create_time createTime from fin_trial_balance
and period_code = #{periodCode} and subject_code like concat(#{subjectCode}, '%') and subject_name like concat('%', #{subjectName}, '%')
order by period_code desc, subject_code

select coalesce(sum(begin_debit), 0.00) beginDebit, coalesce(sum(begin_credit), 0.00) beginCredit, coalesce(sum(current_debit), 0.00) currentDebit, coalesce(sum(current_credit), 0.00) currentCredit, coalesce(sum(end_debit), 0.00) endDebit, coalesce(sum(end_credit), 0.00) endCredit from fin_trial_balance
and period_code = #{periodCode} and subject_code like concat(#{subjectCode}, '%') and subject_name like concat('%', #{subjectName}, '%')

select invoice_id invoiceId, invoice_no invoiceNo, supplier_invoice_no supplierInvoiceNo, purchase_no purchaseNo, receipt_refs receiptRefs, supplier_id supplierId, supplier_name supplierName, invoice_date invoiceDate, due_date dueDate, period_code periodCode, amount_ex_tax amountExTax, tax_amount taxAmount, line_total_amount lineTotalAmount, total_amount totalAmount, header_variance headerVariance, match_status matchStatus, invoice_status invoiceStatus, exception_reason exceptionReason, payable_no payableNo from fin_supplier_invoice where invoice_no = #{invoiceNo}

select payment_id paymentId, payment_no paymentNo, source_type sourceType, source_no sourceNo, counterparty_type counterpartyType, counterparty_id counterpartyId, counterparty_name counterpartyName, payable_no payableNo, payment_amount paymentAmount, coalesce(paid_amount, 0.00) paidAmount, requested_pay_date requestedPayDate, payment_status paymentStatus, approve_by approveBy, approve_time approveTime, create_by createBy, create_time createTime, remark from fin_payment_request where payment_no = #{paymentNo}
select bank_account_id bankAccountId, account_name accountName, bank_name bankName, bank_no bankNo, currency, status from fin_bank_account where bank_account_id = #{bankAccountId} and status = '0'

select coalesce(sum(greatest(payment_amount - coalesce(paid_amount, 0.00), 0.00)), 0.00) from fin_payment_request where payable_no = #{payableNo} and payment_status in ('submitted', 'approved', 'partially_paid')

select cash_flow_id cashFlowId, flow_no flowNo, flow_type flowType, flow_category flowCategory, bank_account_id bankAccountId, platform_account_id platformAccountId, counterparty_type counterpartyType, counterparty_name counterpartyName, source_type sourceType, source_no sourceNo, currency, external_reference externalReference, amount, fee_amount feeAmount, net_amount netAmount, settled_amount settledAmount, greatest(amount - settled_amount, 0.00) availableAmount, flow_time flowTime, business_date businessDate, match_status matchStatus, entry_status entryStatus, voucher_no voucherNo, reversal_flow_no reversalFlowNo, remark from fin_cash_flow where flow_no = #{flowNo}

select expense_id expenseId, expense_no expenseNo, fee_type_code feeTypeCode, fee_type_name feeTypeName, shop_id shopId, shop_name shopName, sku_id skuId, sku_code skuCode, order_no orderNo, supplier_id supplierId, supplier_name supplierName, period_code periodCode, expense_amount expenseAmount, tax_amount taxAmount, total_amount totalAmount, allocation_dimension allocationDimension, expense_status expenseStatus, occurred_date occurredDate from fin_expense_bill where expense_no = #{expenseNo}

select fee_type_id feeTypeId, fee_code feeCode, fee_name feeName, fee_category feeCategory, default_subject_code defaultSubjectCode, allocate_rule allocateRule from fin_fee_type where fee_code = #{feeCode}

select voucher_id voucherId, voucher_no voucherNo, period_code periodCode, source_type sourceType, source_no sourceNo, debit_amount debitAmount, credit_amount creditAmount, voucher_status voucherStatus from fin_voucher where voucher_no = #{voucherNo}

select voucher_id voucherId, voucher_no voucherNo, period_code periodCode, source_type sourceType, source_no sourceNo, debit_amount debitAmount, credit_amount creditAmount, voucher_status voucherStatus from fin_voucher where source_type = #{sourceType} and source_no = #{sourceNo} limit 1

select entry_id entryId, voucher_id voucherId, voucher_no voucherNo, entry_seq entrySeq, subject_code subjectCode, subject_name subjectName, direction, amount, shop_id shopId, sku_id skuId, counterparty_name counterpartyName, summary from fin_voucher_entry where voucher_no = #{voucherNo} order by entry_seq

select s.settlement_no settlementNo, s.receivable_amount expectedAmount, coalesce(sum(case when cf.cash_flow_id is null then 0 else cf.amount end), 0.00) actualAmount from fin_platform_settlement s left join fin_receivable_bill rb on rb.source_type = 'settlement' and rb.source_no = s.settlement_no left join fin_cash_flow cf on (cf.source_type = 'settlement' and cf.source_no = s.settlement_no) or (cf.source_type = 'receivable' and cf.source_no = rb.receivable_no) where s.period_code = #{periodCode} and s.shop_id = #{shopId} group by s.settlement_no, s.receivable_amount order by s.settlement_no

select (select count(1) from fin_platform_settlement where period_code = #{periodCode} and settlement_status = 'draft') draftSettlementCount, (select count(1) from fin_platform_settlement where period_code = #{periodCode} and reconcile_status != 'matched') unmatchedSettlementCount, (select count(1) from fin_cash_flow where date_format(business_date, '%Y-%m') = #{periodCode} and entry_status = 'posted' and match_status != 'matched') unmatchedCashCount, (select count(1) from fin_cash_flow where date_format(business_date, '%Y-%m') = #{periodCode} and entry_status = 'draft') unpostedCashCount, (select count(1) from fin_voucher where period_code = #{periodCode} and voucher_status != 'posted') draftVoucherCount, (select count(1) from fin_receivable_bill where period_code = #{periodCode} and bill_status != 'settled') openReceivableCount, (select count(1) from fin_payable_bill where period_code = #{periodCode} and bill_status != 'settled') openPayableCount
mapper.insert: insert into fin_platform_settlement( settlement_no, platform_code, platform_name, shop_id, shop_name, period_code, bill_start_date, bill_end_date, income_amount, refund_amount, commission_fee, payment_fee, ad_fee, service_fee, freight_fee, other_fee, receivable_amount, received_amount, diff_amount, settlement_status, reconcile_status, source_file, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{settlementNo}, #{platformCode}, #{platformName}, #{shopId}, #{shopName}, #{periodCode}, #{billStartDate}, #{billEndDate}, coalesce(#{incomeAmount}, 0.00), coalesce(#{refundAmount}, 0.00), coalesce(#{commissionFee}, 0.00), coalesce(#{paymentFee}, 0.00), coalesce(#{adFee}, 0.00), coalesce(#{serviceFee}, 0.00), coalesce(#{freightFee}, 0.00), coalesce(#{otherFee}, 0.00), #{receivableAmount}, #{receivedAmount}, #{diffAmount}, #{settlementStatus}, #{reconcileStatus}, #{sourceFile}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update fin_platform_settlement set settlement_status = 'confirmed', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where settlement_no = #{settlementNo} and settlement_status = 'draft'

update fin_platform_settlement set received_amount = #{receivedAmount}, diff_amount = #{diffAmount}, reconcile_status = #{reconcileStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where settlement_no = #{settlementNo}

update fin_receivable_bill set writeoff_amount = writeoff_amount + #{writeoffAmount}, remain_amount = #{remainAmount}, bill_status = #{billStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where receivable_no = #{billNo} and remain_amount = #{oldRemainAmount} and bill_status in ('open', 'partial')
mapper.insert: insert into fin_cash_flow( flow_no, flow_type, flow_category, bank_account_id, platform_account_id, counterparty_type, counterparty_name, source_type, source_no, currency, external_reference, amount, fee_amount, net_amount, settled_amount, flow_time, business_date, match_status, entry_status, voucher_no, posted_by, posted_time, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{flowNo}, #{flowType}, #{flowCategory}, #{bankAccountId}, #{platformAccountId}, #{counterpartyType}, #{counterpartyName}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceNo}, #{currency}, #{externalReference}, #{amount}, #{feeAmount}, #{netAmount}, #{settledAmount}, #{flowTime}, #{businessDate}, #{matchStatus}, #{entryStatus}, #{voucherNo}, #{postedBy}, #{postedTime}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update fin_platform_settlement set platform_code = #{platformCode}, platform_name = #{platformName}, shop_id = #{shopId}, shop_name = #{shopName}, period_code = #{periodCode}, bill_start_date = #{billStartDate}, bill_end_date = #{billEndDate}, income_amount = coalesce(#{incomeAmount}, 0.00), refund_amount = coalesce(#{refundAmount}, 0.00), commission_fee = coalesce(#{commissionFee}, 0.00), payment_fee = coalesce(#{paymentFee}, 0.00), ad_fee = coalesce(#{adFee}, 0.00), service_fee = coalesce(#{serviceFee}, 0.00), freight_fee = coalesce(#{freightFee}, 0.00), other_fee = coalesce(#{otherFee}, 0.00), receivable_amount = #{receivableAmount}, diff_amount = #{diffAmount}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where settlement_no = #{settlementNo} and settlement_status = 'draft'
update fin_platform_settlement set settlement_status = 'voided', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where settlement_no = #{settlementNo} and settlement_status = 'draft'
update fin_cash_flow set entry_status = 'voided', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where flow_no = #{flowNo} and entry_status = 'draft'

update fin_cash_flow set entry_status = 'posted', posted_by = #{postedBy}, posted_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{postedBy}, update_time = sysdate() where flow_no = #{flowNo} and entry_status = 'draft'

update fin_cash_flow set entry_status = 'reversed', reversal_flow_no = #{reversalFlowNo}, reversed_by = #{reversedBy}, reversed_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{reversedBy}, update_time = sysdate() where flow_no = #{flowNo} and entry_status = 'posted' and coalesce(settled_amount, 0.00) = 0.00 and reversal_flow_no is null

update fin_cash_flow set source_type = coalesce(nullif(source_type, ''), #{sourceType}), source_no = coalesce(nullif(source_no, ''), #{sourceNo}), match_status = case when settled_amount + #{writeoffAmount} >= amount - 0.01 then 'matched' else 'partial' end, settled_amount = settled_amount + #{writeoffAmount}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where flow_no = #{flowNo} and entry_status = 'posted' and coalesce(settled_amount, 0.00) = #{oldSettledAmount}
mapper.insert: insert into fin_expense_bill( expense_no, fee_type_code, fee_type_name, shop_id, shop_name, sku_id, sku_code, order_no, supplier_id, supplier_name, period_code, expense_amount, tax_amount, total_amount, allocation_dimension, expense_status, occurred_date, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{expenseNo}, #{feeTypeCode}, #{feeTypeName}, #{shopId}, #{shopName}, #{skuId}, #{skuCode}, #{orderNo}, #{supplierId}, #{supplierName}, #{periodCode}, #{expenseAmount}, #{taxAmount}, #{totalAmount}, #{allocationDimension}, #{expenseStatus}, #{occurredDate}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update fin_expense_bill set expense_status = 'approved', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where expense_no = #{expenseNo} and expense_status = 'draft'

update fin_payable_bill set writeoff_amount = writeoff_amount + #{writeoffAmount}, remain_amount = #{remainAmount}, bill_status = #{billStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where payable_no = #{billNo} and remain_amount = #{oldRemainAmount} and bill_status in ('open', 'partial')
mapper.insert: insert into fin_supplier_invoice( invoice_no, supplier_invoice_no, purchase_no, receipt_refs, supplier_id, supplier_name, invoice_date, due_date, period_code, amount_ex_tax, tax_amount, line_total_amount, total_amount, header_variance, match_policy, price_tolerance_percent, quantity_tolerance, amount_tolerance, match_status, invoice_status, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{invoiceNo}, #{supplierInvoiceNo}, #{purchaseNo}, #{receiptRefs}, #{supplierId}, #{supplierName}, #{invoiceDate}, #{dueDate}, #{periodCode}, #{amountExTax}, #{taxAmount}, #{lineTotalAmount}, #{totalAmount}, #{headerVariance}, #{matchPolicy}, #{priceTolerancePercent}, #{quantityTolerance}, #{amountTolerance}, #{matchStatus}, #{invoiceStatus}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update fin_expense_bill set fee_type_code = #{feeTypeCode}, fee_type_name = #{feeTypeName}, shop_id = #{shopId}, shop_name = #{shopName}, sku_id = #{skuId}, sku_code = #{skuCode}, order_no = #{orderNo}, supplier_id = #{supplierId}, supplier_name = #{supplierName}, period_code = #{periodCode}, expense_amount = #{expenseAmount}, tax_amount = #{taxAmount}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, allocation_dimension = #{allocationDimension}, occurred_date = #{occurredDate}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where expense_no = #{expenseNo} and expense_status = 'draft'
update fin_expense_bill set expense_status = 'voided', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where expense_no = #{expenseNo} and expense_status = 'draft'
mapper.insert: insert into fin_supplier_invoice_item( invoice_id, invoice_no, purchase_item_id, sku_id, sku_code, sku_name, invoice_quantity, invoice_unit_price, invoice_tax_rate, invoice_amount, tax_amount, total_amount, order_quantity, order_unit_price, received_quantity, previous_invoiced_quantity, available_received_quantity, quantity_variance, price_variance, price_variance_percent, amount_variance, line_match_status, match_message ) values ( #{invoiceId}, #{invoiceNo}, #{purchaseItemId}, #{skuId}, #{skuCode}, #{skuName}, #{invoiceQuantity}, #{invoiceUnitPrice}, #{invoiceTaxRate}, #{invoiceAmount}, #{taxAmount}, #{totalAmount}, #{orderQuantity}, #{orderUnitPrice}, #{receivedQuantity}, #{previousInvoicedQuantity}, #{availableReceivedQuantity}, #{quantityVariance}, #{priceVariance}, #{priceVariancePercent}, #{amountVariance}, #{lineMatchStatus}, #{matchMessage} )
mapper.update: update fin_supplier_invoice set match_status = #{matchStatus}, invoice_status = 'approved', exception_reason = #{exceptionReason}, payable_no = #{payableNo}, approve_by = #{approveBy}, approve_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{approveBy}, update_time = sysdate() where invoice_no = #{invoiceNo} and invoice_status = 'pending'

update fin_payment_request set payment_status = 'approved', approve_by = #{approveBy}, approve_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{approveBy}, update_time = sysdate() where payment_no = #{paymentNo} and payment_status = 'submitted'

update fin_payment_request set payment_status = 'rejected', approve_by = #{approveBy}, approve_time = sysdate(), remark = concat_ws('\n', nullif(remark, ''), concat('驳回原因：', #{rejectReason})), update_by = #{approveBy}, update_time = sysdate() where payment_no = #{paymentNo} and payment_status = 'submitted'
update fin_voucher set voucher_status = 'posted', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where voucher_no = #{voucherNo} and voucher_status = 'draft'
mapper.select: select count(*) from fin_ledger_entry where voucher_no = #{voucherNo}
mapper.insert: insert into fin_ledger_entry( voucher_no, period_code, voucher_date, subject_code, subject_name, dc, amount, counterparty_name, source_type, source_no, create_time ) select v.voucher_no, v.period_code, v.voucher_date, e.subject_code, e.subject_name, e.direction, e.amount, e.counterparty_name, v.source_type, v.source_no, sysdate() from fin_voucher v inner join fin_voucher_entry e on e.voucher_id = v.voucher_id where v.voucher_no = #{voucherNo} and v.voucher_status = 'posted' and not exists (select 1 from fin_ledger_entry l where l.voucher_no = v.voucher_no)

insert into fin_trial_balance( period_code, subject_code, subject_name, begin_debit, begin_credit, current_debit, current_credit, end_debit, end_credit, create_time ) select #{periodCode}, balances.subjectCode, balances.subjectName, greatest(balances.beginNet, 0.00), greatest(-balances.beginNet, 0.00), balances.currentDebit, balances.currentCredit, greatest(balances.beginNet + balances.currentDebit - balances.currentCredit, 0.00), greatest(-(balances.beginNet + balances.currentDebit - balances.currentCredit), 0.00), sysdate() from ( select subject_code subjectCode, max(subject_name) subjectName, sum(case when period_code < #{periodCode} then case when dc = 'debit' then amount else -amount end else 0 end) beginNet, sum(case when period_code = #{periodCode} and dc = 'debit' then amount else 0 end) currentDebit, sum(case when period_code = #{periodCode} and dc = 'credit' then amount else 0 end) currentCredit from fin_ledger_entry where period_code <= #{periodCode} group by subject_code ) balances where balances.beginNet != 0 or balances.currentDebit != 0 or balances.currentCredit != 0
mapper.update: update fin_reconciliation_task set task_status = #{taskStatus}, total_count = #{totalCount}, diff_count = #{diffCount}, finish_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{createBy}, update_time = sysdate() where task_id = #{taskId}
update fin_reconciliation_diff set diff_status = 'resolved', handle_result = #{handleResult}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where diff_no = #{diffNo} and diff_status = 'open'

update fin_period_close set check_status = #{checkStatus}, order_complete = #{orderComplete}, settlement_complete = #{settlementComplete}, bank_complete = #{bankComplete}, voucher_complete = #{voucherComplete}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where period_code = #{periodCode} and close_scope = #{closeScope}

update fin_period_close set close_status = 'closed', close_by = #{closeBy}, close_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where period_code = #{periodCode} and close_scope = #{closeScope} and check_status = 'passed'

update fin_period_close set close_status = 'open', close_by = '', close_time = null, check_status = 'unchecked', remark = concat('反关账：', #{reason}), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where period_code = #{periodCode} and close_scope = #{closeScope}
update fin_account_period set close_status = 'closed', close_by = #{closeBy}, close_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where period_code = #{periodCode}
update fin_account_period set close_status = 'open', close_by = '', close_time = null, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where period_code = #{periodCode}
